note: The official 2025-2026 Handbook publishes 70 units of Major Courses: 46 units of Major Required Courses and 24 units from one selected concentration, plus a 6-unit Honours Project. The three concentration alternatives are Creativity and Culture; Innovation, Policy and Value; and Innovation Project Management. An asterisk on the official table identifies concentration required courses; all other courses in that concentration are retained as its published elective pool without inferring an unstated course count or sequencing rule. DIFH3006 is the required 3-unit Internship, and DIFH4898 plus DIFH4899 form the 6-unit Honours Project. The Programme table labels both project courses “Honours Project”; their linked course pages publish the canonical titles “Digital Futures and Humanities Project I” and “Digital Futures and Humanities Project II”, which are stored here. The 27-unit open Free Electives pool, University Language Courses and General Education Courses are excluded because the Programme page does not publish closed coded lists for them. HIST3146 is included from the official Programme table although that row has no linked course page. The 2026-2027 Handbook endpoint currently returns HTTP 401 Basic Authentication, so this supplement is explicitly scoped to 2025-2026. No Year or Term is assigned.
